summary: Iteration 12 applies targeted text fixes. CSI honestly demoted. Abstract decomposed. Orphan files removed. Paper is now internally consistent. Remaining issues are experimental (ImageNet, seeds) and cannot be fixed by text edits.

findings.description: No ImageNet experiments after 8+ iterations. Project constraints mandate ImageNet.
N=3 seeds insufficient for null-result claims. TOST passes only 6/12 comparisons.
Section 5.7 could be condensed as a double-null finding.
